children.heading: General authority; establishment of schedule
children.label: a General authority; establishment of schedule
children.text: The Commission shall assess and collect application fees at such rates as the Commission shall establish in a schedule of application fees to recover the costs of the Commission to process applications.

children.label: A
children.text: increased or decreased by the percentage change in the Consumer Price Index during the period beginning on such date and ending on the date of the review; and

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of a fee the current amount of which is less than $200, the adjustment would result in a change in the current amount of less than $10; or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a fee the current amount of which is $200 or more, the adjustment would result in a change in the current amount of less than 5 percent.

children.heading: Current amount defined
children.label: 3 Current amount defined
children.text: In paragraph (2), the term “current amount” means, with respect to a fee, the amount of the fee on the date when the fee was established, the date when the fee was last adjusted under paragraph (1), or the date when the fee was last amended under subsection (c), whichever is latest.
so that such fees reflect increases or decreases in the costs of processing applications at the Commission; or
so that such schedule reflects the consolidation or addition of new categories of applications.

children.heading: Parties to which fees are not applicable
children.label: 1 Parties to which fees are not applicable
B
children.text: a nonprofit entity licensed in the Local Government, Police, Fire, Highway Maintenance, Forestry-Conservation, Public Safety, or Special Emergency Radio radio services; or

children.label: C
children.text: a noncommercial radio station or noncommercial television station.

children.heading: Cost of collection
children.label: 2 Cost of collection
children.text: If, in the judgment of the Commission, the cost of collecting an application fee established under this section would exceed the amount collected, the Commission may by rule eliminate such fee.

children.heading: Deposit of collections
children.label: e Deposit of collections
children.text: Moneys received from application fees established under this section shall be deposited in the general fund of the Treasury.
